news.summary: In the year 2024, USDC transactions on BitPay surpassed those of USDT by nearly double, however, this year the trend has reversed with Tether transactions now taking the lead.
news.headline: In 2025, Tether USDT edges closer to Circle's USDC on BitPay after USDC transactions fall from double to in favor.

news.summary: In Singapore on July 3, 2025, a highly influential whitepaper named "The Future of Global Payments & Fourth Generation Payment Networks (4GPN)" was unveiled, marking the beginning of a transformative period in fintech. This innovative report, a collaboration between Thunderbird School of Global Management and, explores cutting-edge concepts in the industry.
news.headline: New whitepaper on the future of payments by Thunderbird School explores Fourth Generation Payment Networks (4GPN), setting new industry standards.

news.summary: In Dubai, United Arab Emirates, on July 3, 2025, Bybit, the world's second-highest cryptocurrency exchange based on trading volume, announces the recognition of Robert MacDonald, Chief Legal and Compliance Officer at Bybit. He has been highlighted in the renowned trade publication Asian Legal Business (ALB) for his notable contributions.
news.headline: Bybit's Robert MacDonald named to ALB's Top 15 in 2025. Bybit - 2nd biggest crypto exchange by volume.

news.summary: South Korea has experienced a significant surge in anticipation of reforms that are favorable to shareholders under a new president. This has led to South Korea becoming the top-performing market in Asia and surpassing other markets globally.
news.headline: South Korea's stock market surges 30% due to optimism over pro-shareholder reforms by the new president. Best in Asia.

news.summary: Today, Sectra, a Swedish medical imaging IT and cybersecurity company listed on the Stockholm Stock Exchange under SECT B, released its Annual Report and Sustainability Report for the fiscal year 2024/2025. The reports encompass the Corporate Governance Report for the corresponding period.
news.headline: Sectra releases Annual & Sustainability Reports for 2024/2025 fiscal year in Linköping, Sweden. Contains Corporate Governance Report.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, in Jakarta, Indonesia, Vantage Foundation announced a collaboration with KDM Foundation, a local nonprofit focused on improving the lives of underprivileged children. The partnership aims to support homeless children by providing educational and creative resources. Vantage Foundation's commitment to social responsibility is evident through this initiative, highlighting their dedication to making a positive difference in the community. The collaboration is set to benefit a significant number of homeless children in Jakarta and surrounding areas by enhancing their access to education and fostering creative development.
news.headline: Vantage Foundation partners with KDM Foundation in Jakarta to empower street children through education and creativity.

news.summary: In an announcement made on July 3, 2025, it was revealed that the American Council of Learned Societies (ACLS) is teaming up with The Robert H. N. Ho Family Foundation Global and Yale University Press on a significant project. The collaboration will result in the creation of a new book series called Global Buddhism. This initiative is expected to bring attention to various perspectives on Buddhism on a large scale, with a focus on global outreach and scholarly contributions.
news.headline: ACLS partnering with The Robert H. N. Ho Family Foundation Global & Yale University Press to publish Global Buddhism book series.

news.summary: On June 27 in Linyi City, located in Shandong Province, east China, the 4th RCEP (Shandong) Import Expo commenced. The event showcased 348 participating enterprises through 1,200 booths within an exhibition area spanning 35,000 square meters. Over the course of the expo, it drew the attention of 15,000 visitors, making it a significant platform for business interactions and trade opportunities in the region.
news.headline: 4th RCEP (Shandong) Import Expo in Linyi City, China featured 348 enterprises, 35,000sqm area, 1,200 booths, 15,000 visitors in 2025.

news.summary: Amidst the ongoing pandemic, it has been reported that a total of over 5 million confirmed cases of COVID-19 have been recorded worldwide, with the global death toll surpassing 300,000. In the United States alone, there have been more than 1.5 million confirmed cases and over 90,000 deaths. The situation remains critical in many countries, with efforts being made to curb the spread of the virus through social distancing measures and increased testing. The economic impact of the pandemic is also being keenly felt, with unemployment rates rising sharply in various nations. Leaders are facing tough decisions on how to balance public health and economic concerns during this challenging time.
news.headline: BitcoinIRA introduces groundbreaking Cardano (ADA) staking service for IRAs, a first in the industry. #Crypto #Staking #IRAs

news.summary: Employing a combination of CI/CD integration, a specialized "test farm," and an emphasis on cutting-edge efficiency and automation solutions led to a significant reduction in certification periods. Initial expectations of a 12-18 month timeframe were surpassed as the process was streamlined to just 8 months.
news.headline: ECARX white paper reveals over 50% integration time cut for Google's GAS automotive app suite, down to 8 months from 12-18.

news.summary: Novogene Europe has recently revealed the addition of its fifth Illumina NovaSeq X Plus sequencing system in Munich on July 3, 2025. This new installation is aimed at addressing the increasing demand for high-throughput sequencing in Europe. With this strategic upgrade, Novogene Europe is reinforcing its position as a prominent player in the region's sequencing market, enhancing its capacity to cater to the growing needs of customers.
news.headline: Novogene Europe bolsters sequencing capacity with fifth NovaSeq X Plus system in Europe, meeting growing demand in region.

news.summary: In Abu Dhabi, UAE on July 3, 2025, the highly anticipated F1: The Movie had its regional debut at the iconic Yas Marina Circuit. Accompanying this premiere was the release of a "Making Of" video, offering insight into the production process with comments from the cast and crew. This event garnered significant attention, with an attendance of numbers in the thousands. The film's unveiling at such a prestigious location added to the excitement, with viewers getting an exclusive peek behind the scenes.
news.headline: Abu Dhabi hosts regional premiere of F1: The Movie at Yas Marina Circuit, followed by release of "Making Of" video.

news.summary: On July 3, 2025, So-Young International Inc. (Nasdaq: SY), a prominent aesthetic treatment platform in China facilitating online services and offline treatments, disclosed the reception of a written compliance notification. This news marks a significant development for the company as it continues to solidify its position as a leader in the industry.
news.headline: So-Young (Nasdaq: SY) regains compliance with Nasdaq's minimum bid price requirement on July 3, 2025.

news.summary: In Qingdao, China, on July 3, 2025, Hisense, a prominent brand in consumer electronics and home appliances worldwide, is creating memorable experiences for fans at the FIFA Club World Cup 2025™ through its "Own the Moment" campaign. The campaign is being showcased at MetLife Stadium in New York/New Jersey, providing fans with unique opportunities during the event.
news.headline: Hisense offers "Own the Moment" experiences at FIFA Club World Cup 2025, engaging global fans at MetLife Stadium.

news.summary: In 2024, BitPay’s transactions with the USDC stablecoin surpassed those with USDT by nearly twofold. However, the situation has reversed in the current year, with a significant shift towards Tether's favor.
news.headline: In 2025, Tether closes gap on USDC with more transactions than BitPay's stablecoin. USDT now leads the way. #Cryptocurrency.

news.summary: Giant Leap Digital recently premiered their new series titled "In Conversations With..." showcasing discussions with family office executives and luxury innovators. They shared insightful perspectives on the substantial $67 trillion wealth transfer. The luxury digital marketing agency, renowned for its work in the industry, aims to provide data-driven insights through this initiative. The series promises to offer valuable insights into the dynamics of wealth transfer and the strategies employed by key players in the industry. This launch signifies Giant Leap Digital's commitment to delivering informative content to its audience.
news.headline: Podcast series reveals 60% of UK wealth will be female-controlled by 2025, discusses $67 trillion wealth transfer.

news.summary: In the city of Rimini, Italy, on July 3, 2025, the Gelato World Cup and Juniores Pastry World Cup will take place. These competitions bring together the most skilled gelato masters worldwide and showcase the talents of young pastry chefs on an international platform. The Gelato World Cup is known as the premier event for gelato professionals, while the Juniores Pastry World Cup highlights emerging talent in the pastry industry. Both events attract significant global attention and participation from top professionals in these sectors.
news.headline: Italy to host Sigep World 2026 with Gelato World Cup; Pizza (R)evolution returns; India as guest country.

news.summary: The article provides insights into the global Caustic Soda Flakes market, with key data indicating the market size at about USD 12.03 billion in 2024 and an expected growth to USD 16.81 billion by 2034, at a CAGR of 3.20%. Drivers for this growth include demand from industries like alumina refining, pulp and paper, and textile processing, particularly in regions like Asia-Pacific. The integration of aluminum smelters with chlor-alkali facilities in the Middle East and the expansion of the textile and paper industries in Asia-Pacific are key trends boosting demand. Additionally, enforcement of water and waste management legislation and volatility in energy and power pricing are identified as factors impacting the market. The article also mentions the challenges in balancing the supply of the chlorine-co-product which affects the production of caustic soda. These insights are part of the research report by Custom Market Insights, including detailed market segments by application, type, and region, forecasting the market growth from 2025 to 2034, with a detailed analysis of key factors, trends, and market dynamics.
news.headline: Global Caustic Soda Flakes market to reach USD 16.81 billion by 2034 at a 3.20% CAGR. Demand was valued at USD 12.03 billion in 2024. Key drivers include alumina refining, pulp & paper, and textile processing industries in Asia-Pacific, with the market witnessing growth due to various factors such as environmental regulations, industrial growth in Asia-Pacific, and energy pricing volatility.
